chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 528 of 2022 Date Order with Signature of Hon’ble Judge Hearing of case For hearing of main case 15.09.2022 Mr. Muhammad Shahban Bhand, Advocate, holding brief for Syed Jaffer Ali Shah, Advocate for the petitioner Mr. Niaz Hussain Matilo, Advocate for respondent / University Mr. Asfandyar Kharal, Assistant Advocate General <><><><>..<><><><> The petitioner served in Shah Abdul Latif University, Khairpur and retired on 14.08.2021 from the post of Assistant Controller of Examinations (BPS-18). His grievance is that he has not yet been paid Commutation amount being one of the service benefits by the University. Today, learned counsel for the respondents / University filed details of outstanding amount, which reflect that an amount of Rs.26,47,619/- is outstanding being Commutation amount, which would be paid in two installments upto 15th February, 2023. We have observed that the petitioner has retired about 13 months back, yet his service benefits have not fully been paid to him. We do not see any justification in giving further five months’ time for payment of the Commutation amount, hence, we disposed of this petition by directing to respondents 2 and 4 to pay the said amount to petitioner within thirty days hereof, without fail. Judge Judge ARBROHI
